message:
feat(events): add EventFilter and NotificationGate for notification gating (wa-psm.3)

Implements event filtering and throttling infrastructure for the notification
pipeline. EventFilter provides glob-based include/exclude patterns on rule_id,
minimum severity threshold, and agent-type allowlist. NotificationGate composes
EventFilter with the existing EventDeduplicator and NotificationCooldown into a
single decision point. NotificationConfig in config.rs exposes these settings via
wa.toml with sensible defaults (30s cooldown, 5min dedup window).

- EventFilter: glob matching, severity threshold, agent-type filtering
- NotificationGate: filter → dedup → cooldown pipeline with NotifyDecision enum
- NotificationConfig: TOML-serializable config section with to_event_filter/to_notification_gate
- 29 new tests (15 filter, 6 gate, 5 glob, 1 severity, 2 parse) + 6 config tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
